prediction.reasoning: Based on AMGN's historical volatility of approximately 20-25% annually (roughly 1.5-2% weekly standard deviation), the stock shows moderate volatility typical of large-cap biotech stocks. The confidence intervals are constructed assuming roughly normal distribution of weekly returns with standard deviation of approximately 2%, widening appropriately for higher confidence levels.
